chunks.title: Oracle Against Moab and Nebo
chunks.reason: A unified prophetic declaration of judgment against Moab's cities and strongholds.

chunks.title: Call to Mourn the Broken Scepter
chunks.reason: A direct address to the inhabitants of Moab calling for lamentation over their fallen power.

chunks.title: Judgment on Pride and Harvest
chunks.reason: A section combining the metaphor of wine dregs with descriptions of lost joy and harvest.

chunks.title: Cessation of Worship and Final Destruction
chunks.reason: A declaration ending Moab's religious practices and confirming total destruction.

chunks.title: Panic, Fire, and Future Restoration
chunks.reason: A concluding warning of inescapable disaster followed by a promise of future restoration.
